sql.if: AND ( A.ATT_REQ_TYPE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR V.VCT_DOC_RSN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR T.BZTRP_RSN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR O.EXCS_WORK_DOC_RES LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

if.if: AND (V.VCT_DOC_RSN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR T.BZTRP_RSN LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR O.EXCS_WORK_DOC_RES LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND TRUNC(ATT_WORK_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: MERGE INTO ATTENDANCE_WORK_STATUS T USING DUAL ON (T.EMP_ID = #{empId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.ATT_WORK_STTS = '출근' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (EMP_ID, ATT_WORK_STTS) VALUES (#{empId}, '출근')

UPDATE ATTENDANCE SET ATT_CHECK_OUT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, ATT_STTS = '퇴근', ATT_DAY_TIME = ROUND((CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(ATT_CHECK_IN AS DATE)) * 24, 1),
ATT_DAY_MLG = CASE WHEN (CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(ATT_CHECK_IN AS DATE)) * 24 >= 8 THEN 100 + (ROUND(((CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(ATT_CHECK_IN AS DATE)) * 24) - 8, 1) * 10)
ELSE ROUND((CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS DATE) - CAST(ATT_CHECK_IN AS DATE)) * 24, 1) * 10 END WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND TRUNC(ATT_WORK_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ATT_CHECK_OUT IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT ATT_DAY_MLG FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND TRUNC(ATT_WORK_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: MERGE INTO ATTENDANCE_WORK_STATUS T USING DUAL ON (T.EMP_ID = #{empId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.ATT_WORK_STTS = '퇴근' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (EMP_ID, ATT_WORK_STTS) VALUES (#{empId}, '퇴근')
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ATT_TYPE_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT ALL INTO ATTENDANCE_TYPE (ATT_TYPE_ID, EMP_ID, ATT_REQ_TYPE) VALUES (#{attTypeId}, #{empId}, '휴가')
INTO APRV_VCT_DOC ( ATT_TYPE_ID, EMP_ID, VCT_DOC_CD, VCT_DOC_BGNG, VCT_DOC_END, VCT_DOC_RSN, VCT_APRV_YN, VCT_STTS, VCT_TOTAL_DAYS ) VALUES ( #{attTypeId}, #{empId}, #{vctDocCd}, #{vctDocBgng}, #{vctDocEnd}, #{vctDocRsn}, 'N', '대기', CASE WHEN #{vctDocCd} IN ('오전반차', '오후반차') THEN 0.5 ELSE #{vctTotalDays} END ) SELECT * FROM DUAL

SELECT SEQ_ATT_TYPE_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT ALL INTO ATTENDANCE_TYPE (ATT_TYPE_ID, EMP_ID, ATT_REQ_TYPE) VALUES (#{attTypeId}, #{empId}, '출장')
INTO APRV_BZTRP_DOC ( ATT_TYPE_ID, EMP_ID, BZTRP_PLC, BZTRP_START, BZTRP_END, BZTRP_RSN, BZTRP_APRV_YN, BZTRP_STTS, BZTRP_TOTAL_DAYS ) VALUES ( #{attTypeId}, #{empId}, #{bztrpPlc}, #{bztrpStart}, #{bztrpEnd}, #{bztrpRsn}, 'N', '대기', #{bztrpTotalDays} ) SELECT * FROM DUAL

SELECT SEQ_ATT_TYPE_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT ALL INTO ATTENDANCE_TYPE (ATT_TYPE_ID, EMP_ID, ATT_REQ_TYPE) VALUES (#{attTypeId}, #{empId}, '초과근무')
INTO APRV_EXCS_WORK_DOC ( ATT_TYPE_ID, EMP_ID, EXCS_WORK_DOC_BGNG, EXCS_WORK_DOC_END, EXCS_WORK_DOC_RES, EXCS_WORK_APRV_YN, EXCS_WORK_STTS ) VALUES ( #{attTypeId}, #{empId}, #{excsWorkDocBgng}, #{excsWorkDocEnd}, #{excsWorkDocRes}, 'N', '대기' ) SELECT * FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT A.ATT_DAY AS attWorkDtStr, B.ATT_ID, B.EMP_ID, /* ✅ 시차 방지를 위해 문자열로 직접 변환 */ TO_CHAR(B.ATT_CHECK_IN, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS strCheckIn, TO_CHAR(B.ATT_CHECK_OUT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS strCheckOut, B.ATT_WORK_DT, B.ATT_STTS, B.ATT_LATE_YN, B.ATT_DAY_MLG, B.ATT_DAY_TIME FROM ( SELECT #{year} || '-' || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') || '-' || LPAD(LEVEL, 2, '0') AS ATT_DAY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(TO_DATE(#{year} || '-' || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')), 'DD') ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTENDANCE B ON A.ATT_DAY = TO_CHAR(B.ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND B.EMP_ID = #{empId} ORDER BY A.ATT_DAY

SELECT TO_CHAR(EXCS_WORK_DOC_BGNG, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "eventDate", 'overtime' AS "eventType", '초과근무' AS "eventLabel", EXCS_WORK_STTS AS "formStatus" FROM APRV_EXCS_WORK_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND EXCS_WORK_STTS = '결재완료' /* 🦾 형이 바꾼 부분: LPAD로 월 2자리 강제 */ AND TO_CHAR(EXCS_WORK_DOC_BGNG, 'YYYY-MM') = #{year} || '-' || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')
UNION ALL
SELECT TO_CHAR(T.BGNG + (LEVEL - 1), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "eventDate", 'vacation' AS "eventType", T.LABEL AS "eventLabel", T.STTS AS "formStatus" FROM ( SELECT VCT_DOC_BGNG AS BGNG, VCT_DOC_END AS END_DT, (VCT_DOC_END - VCT_DOC_BGNG) + 1 AS DAYS, ATT_TYPE_ID AS ID, CASE WHEN VCT_DOC_CD = '일반' THEN '정기휴가' WHEN VCT_DOC_CD = '오전반차' THEN '오전반차' WHEN VCT_DOC_CD = '오후반차' THEN '오후반차' WHEN VCT_DOC_CD = '병가' THEN '병가' WHEN VCT_DOC_CD = '공가' THEN '공가' ELSE '' || VCT_DOC_CD END AS LABEL, VCT_STTS AS STTS FROM APRV_VCT_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND VCT_STTS = '결재완료' ) T /* 🦾 형이 바꾼 부분: LPAD로 월 2자리 강제 */ WHERE TO_CHAR(T.BGNG + (LEVEL - 1), 'YYYY-MM') = #{year} || '-' || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') CONNECT BY LEVEL <= T.DAYS AND PRIOR T.ID = T.ID AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT TO_CHAR(T.START_DT + (LEVEL - 1), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "eventDate", 'trip' AS "eventType", '출장' AS "eventLabel", T.STTS AS "formStatus" FROM ( SELECT BZTRP_START AS START_DT, BZTRP_END AS END_DT, (BZTRP_END - BZTRP_START) + 1 AS DAYS, ATT_TYPE_ID AS ID, BZTRP_STTS AS STTS FROM APRV_BZTRP_DOC WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND BZTRP_STTS = '결재완료' ) T WHERE TO_CHAR(T.START_DT + (LEVEL - 1), 'YYYY-MM') = #{year} || '-' || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') CONNECT BY LEVEL <= T.DAYS AND PRIOR T.ID = T.ID AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ATTENDANCE_TYPE A LEFT OUTER JOIN APRV_VCT_DOC V ON A.ATT_TYPE_ID = V.ATT_TYPE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN APRV_BZTRP_DOC T ON A.ATT_TYPE_ID = T.ATT_TYPE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN APRV_EXCS_WORK_DOC O ON A.ATT_TYPE_ID = O.ATT_TYPE_ID WHERE A.EMP_ID = #{empId}

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY APP_DATE DESC) RNUM, T2.* FROM ( SELECT A.ATT_TYPE_ID, A.EMP_ID, A.ATT_REQ_TYPE AS TYPE, V.VCT_DOC_CD AS vctDocCd, CASE WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '휴가' THEN V.VCT_DOC_BGNG WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '출장' THEN T.BZTRP_START WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '초과근무' THEN O.EXCS_WORK_DOC_BGNG END AS APP_DATE, CASE WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '휴가' THEN V.VCT_DOC_END WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '출장' THEN T.BZTRP_END WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '초과근무' THEN O.EXCS_WORK_DOC_END END AS APP_END_DATE, CASE WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '휴가' THEN NVL(V.VCT_TOTAL_DAYS, 0) WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '출장' THEN NVL(T.BZTRP_TOTAL_DAYS, 0) WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '초과근무' THEN 0 ELSE 0 END AS TOTAL_DAYS, CASE WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '휴가' THEN V.VCT_DOC_RSN WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '출장' THEN T.BZTRP_RSN WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '초과근무' THEN O.EXCS_WORK_DOC_RES END AS REASON, CASE WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '휴가' THEN V.VCT_STTS WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '출장' THEN T.BZTRP_STTS WHEN A.ATT_REQ_TYPE = '초과근무' THEN O.EXCS_WORK_STTS END AS STATUS FROM ATTENDANCE_TYPE A LEFT OUTER JOIN APRV_VCT_DOC V ON A.ATT_TYPE_ID = V.ATT_TYPE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN APRV_BZTRP_DOC T ON A.ATT_TYPE_ID = T.ATT_TYPE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN APRV_EXCS_WORK_DOC O ON A.ATT_TYPE_ID = O.ATT_TYPE_ID WHERE A.EMP_ID = #{empId}
) T2 ) T WHERE T.RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10 - 9) AND (#{currentPage} * 10)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM APRV_VCT_DOC WHERE ATT_TYPE_ID = #{attTypeId} AND VCT_STTS = '대기' AND EMP_ID = ${empId}
DELETE FROM APRV_BZTRP_DOC WHERE ATT_TYPE_ID = #{attTypeId} AND BZTRP_STTS = '대기' AND EMP_ID = ${empId}
DELETE FROM APRV_EXCS_WORK_DOC WHERE ATT_TYPE_ID = #{attTypeId} AND EXCS_WORK_STTS = '대기' AND EMP_ID = ${empId}
mapper.select: SELECT A.EMP_ID, A.EMP_NM, A.EMP_JBGD, A.EMP_EML, A.EMP_PHONE, A.EMP_REGIST_DT, A.EMP_PROFILE, B.DEPT_NM FROM EMPLOYEE A JOIN DEPARTMENT B ON A.DEPT_CD = B.DEPT_CD WHERE B.DEPT_NM = #{deptNm}

SELECT A.ATT_DAY, B.*, C.ATT_OUT_ID, C.ATT_OUT_START_DT, C.ATT_OUT_END_DT, C.ATT_OUT_RSN, C.ATT_OUT_TIME, D.ATT_WORK_STTS FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + LEVEL - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ATT_DAY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= (TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') - TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1) ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTENDANCE B ON A.ATT_DAY = TO_CHAR(B.ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND B.EMP_ID = #{empId} LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTENDANCE_OUT C ON A.ATT_DAY = TO_CHAR(C.ATT_OUT_START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND C.EMP_ID = #{empId} LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTENDANCE_WORK_STATUS D ON D.EMP_ID = #{empId} ORDER BY A.ATT_DAY

SELECT A.ATT_DAY, B.*, C.ATT_OUT_ID, C.ATT_OUT_START_DT, C.ATT_OUT_END_DT, C.ATT_OUT_RSN, C.ATT_OUT_TIME, D.ATT_WORK_STTS FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') + LEVEL - 1, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS ATT_DAY FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(SYSDATE), 'DD') ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTENDANCE B ON A.ATT_DAY = TO_CHAR(B.ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND B.EMP_ID = #{empId} LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTENDANCE_OUT C ON A.ATT_DAY = TO_CHAR(C.ATT_OUT_START_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND C.EMP_ID = #{empId} LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTENDANCE_WORK_STATUS D ON D.EMP_ID = #{empId} ORDER BY A.ATT_DAY

SELECT d.DEPT_CD, d.DEPT_NM, COUNT(e.EMP_ID) AS TOTAL_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRIM(s.ATT_WORK_STTS) IN ('출근', '근무중', '퇴근', '초과근무') THEN 1 END) AS WORKING_COUNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRIM(s.ATT_WORK_STTS) IN ('오전반차', '오후반차', '출장', '공가', '병가') THEN 1 END) AS SPECIAL_COUNT, ROUND((COUNT(CASE WHEN TRIM(s.ATT_WORK_STTS) IN ('출근', '근무중', '퇴근', '초과근무', '오전반차', '오후반차', '출장') THEN 1 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(e.EMP_ID), 0)) * 100) AS WORK_RATE FROM DEPARTMENT d LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON d.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN ATTENDANCE_WORK_STATUS s ON e.EMP_ID = s.EMP_ID GROUP BY d.DEPT_CD, d.DEPT_NM ORDER BY d.DEPT_CD ASC
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO ATTENDANCE A USING DUAL ON (A.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND TO_CHAR(A.ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(#{attWorkDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.ATT_STTS = #{attStts}, A.ATT_CHECK_IN = TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{strCheckIn}, 'T', ' '), 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), A.ATT_CHECK_OUT = CASE WHEN #{strCheckOut} IS NOT NULL THEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{strCheckOut}, 'T', ' '), 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE NULL END, A.ATT_LATE_YN = #{attLateYn}, A.ATT_DAY_TIME = CASE WHEN #{strCheckIn} IS NOT NULL AND #{strCheckOut} IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{strCheckOut}, 'T', ' '), 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{strCheckIn}, 'T', ' '), 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')) * 24, 1) ELSE 0 END WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( ATT_ID, EMP_ID, ATT_WORK_DT, ATT_STTS, ATT_CHECK_IN, ATT_CHECK_OUT, ATT_LATE_YN, ATT_DAY_TIME ) VALUES ( SEQ_ATT_ID.NEXTVAL, #{empId}, #{attWorkDt}, #{attStts}, TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{strCheckIn}, 'T', ' '), 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI'), CASE WHEN #{strCheckOut} IS NOT NULL THEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{strCheckOut}, 'T', ' '), 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE NULL END, #{attLateYn}, CASE WHEN #{strCheckIn} IS NOT NULL AND #{strCheckOut} IS NOT NULL THEN ROUND((TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{strCheckOut}, 'T', ' '), 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(REPLACE(#{strCheckIn}, 'T', ' '), 1, 16), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI')) * 24, 1) ELSE 0 END )
mapper.select: SELECT ATT_ID, EMP_ID, TO_CHAR(ATT_CHECK_IN, 'HH24:MI') as "attCheckIn2", TO_CHAR(ATT_CHECK_OUT, 'HH24:MI') as "attCheckOut2" FROM ATTENDANCE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND TRUNC(ATT_WORK_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT ATT_OUT_ID, EMP_ID, TO_CHAR(ATT_OUT_START_DT, 'HH24:MI') as "attOutStartDt2", TO_CHAR(ATT_OUT_END_DT, 'HH24:MI') as "attOutEndDt2" FROM ATTENDANCE_OUT WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND TRUNC(ATT_OUT_START_DT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT D.DEPT_NM, E.EMP_NM, E.EMP_JBGD, NVL(A.ATT_WORK_STTS, '결근') AS attWorkStts FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT OUTER JOIN ATTENDANCE_WORK_STATUS A ON (E.EMP_ID = A.EMP_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON (E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD) WHERE E.DEPT_CD = ( SELECT DEPT_CD FROM EMPLOYEE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} ) ORDER BY E.EMP_JBGD_CD, E.EMP_NM ASC
